---
title: "Publications"
---

::: {.pub-card}
![](assets/publications/objectivity.jpg){.pub-image}

### A Quantum Error-Correcting Perspective on Objectivity

Short description tbd.

[Read publication](#)
:::

::: {.pub-card}
![](assets/publications/mereology.jpg){.pub-image}

### Quantum Mereology

Short description tbd.

[Read publication](#)
:::
